name: Louisville Wheelchair-Mobility
districts_or_customers: individual riders for medical appointments, weddings, funerals, family events (Louisville KY metro)
recent_news: Active small operator; BBB-listed; no M&A signals. Profile is medical/wheelchair transport, not school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit tuck-in: this is a ~5-person NEMT/wheelchair transport business, not a school-bus or SPED-route contractor. Too small and wrong service line.

name: RJM Student Transportation Svc
recent_news: No web presence found. Searches for 'RJM Student Transportation' in Raleigh NC returned unrelated RJM trucking/freight entities (RJM Transport LLC, RJM Trucking LLC, RJM Enterprises LLC). No FMCSA or NCDOT school-bus contractor listing surfaced.
fit_notes: Below tuck-in threshold even if real: residential-address single-operator (Osprey Cove Dr is a home), ~5 employees, ~$232k revenue. No verifiable school-district contracts. Not actionable for Summit.

name: Indiana Coach Leasing LLC
recent_news: Buzzfile lists 'Indiana Coach Leasing, LLC' in the Equipment Rental and Leasing industry within Business Services. Whites Creek TN 37189 is the hub for entertainer/luxury coach leasing (Encore, Diamond, Dreamliner, Nitetrain) - not school bus contracting. Not a student-transport operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit: appears to be an entertainer/luxury motorcoach leasing entity, not a school-bus contractor. Misclassified in source list. Exclude from Summit pipeline.

name: Ardonwood School Transport Co
recent_news: No web presence; name likely a misspelling of 'Ardenwood' (Fremont neighborhood/elementary school). Address 4656 Rousillon Ave is residential. No CA SOS or CHP school-bus contractor record surfaced via search. Fremont USD runs in-house transportation; no third-party contract evident.
fit_notes: Below tuck-in threshold: micro-operator (4 employees, ~$197k rev) at a residential address with no discoverable contracts or fleet. Not actionable for Summit.

name: Hiers Transportation
recent_news: No web presence; not listed by Rutherford County Schools transportation vendors (county runs in-house + Gossett Bus Lines for some routes). Address 2045 Sugartree Dr is residential. No FMCSA/TN SOS school-bus contractor data surfaced.
